title: Natural Vitality Calm Magnesium 16oz Powder | Raspberry Lemon Flavored Supplement
description: One 16 oz. bottle of Natural Vitality CALM Magnesium Supplement Drink Mix that helps support healthy magnesium levels and a healthy response to stress. Contains 325 mg of magnesium per serving to support over 300 cellular processes in your body, including heart and brain function. Non-GMO Project Verified, vegan, gluten-free and made without sugar, artificial flavor or synthetic color.
features: DIETARY SUPPLEMENT: One 16 oz. bottle of Natural Vitality CALM Magnesium Supplement Drink Mix that helps support healthy magnesium levels and a healthy response to stress
SUPPORT BALANCED MOOD: Magnesium CALM powder helps manage stress, release tension and relax your mind for a calming experience you can feel
MAGNESIUM CITRATE SUPPLEMENT: Magnesium carbonate and citric acid, when combined with water, create a solution of magnesium citrate, which is better absorbed than magnesium oxide
325 MG OF MAGNESIUM PER SERVING: Contains 325 mg of magnesium per serving to support over 300 cellular processes in your body, including heart and brain function
FIZZY DRINK MIX: Magnesium carbonate, citric acid, stevia (leaf) extract and natural flavor combine to create a raspberry lemon-flavored powder drink mix that mixes with water to create a fizzy drink
DAILY SUPPLEMENT FOR ADULTS: Start with 1/2 teaspoon daily, gradually increasing to 2 teaspoons daily; just mix with water, fizz, sip, chill and feel the power of CALM
FOR MAXIMIZING REST AND RELAXATION: Since 1982, Natural Vitality CALM has been providing stress relief and relaxation as well as sleep support through the power of magnesium sourced from the sea
HEALTHY AND HAPPY LIVING: Natural Vitality has a commitment to calmfulness, equality and holistic sustainability, which helps to make products that make life easier and lessen stress in your life
BEST SELLING: Natural Vitality is the best-selling magnesium supplement brand in the Natural Products Market

This supplement helps promote healthy, restful sleep and relaxation by regulating melatonin, cortisol, and muscle function.
features: MAGNESIUM GLYCINATE LYSINATE SUPPLEMENT: Provides support for muscles, nerves, & sleep quality. 100% chelated for easy digestion.
MAXIMUM ABSORPTION: Magnesium glycinate is 200mg per serving, vegan, non-GMO, gluten-free, and soy-free.
SLEEP AND MUSCLE RELAXATION: Supports healthy, restful sleep and relaxation by regulating melatonin, cortisol, and muscle function.
200 MG PER SERVING: Not buffered with fillers or additives. Each bottle contains 240 tablets.
DOCTOR'S BEST: Dedicated to providing thoroughly researched, rigorously tested, and clinically-approved supplements.
